description: Triggers for comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence including styles, palettes, fonts, stacks, and UX guidelines

queries.query: Design a landing page for my SaaS product using React
Choose a color palette for my mobile fitness app
What font pairing should I use for a fintech dashboard?
UX review my checkout flow — it has 12 fields and no progress bar
What style should I use for my e-commerce site built with Next.js?
Design this UI component: a data table with sorting and filtering
Build a responsive layout for my admin panel in Svelte
Implement this Figma design in Flutter — what stack patterns should I follow?
What chart type should I use for time series data in my analytics app?
Apply UX guidelines to improve my mobile onboarding flow
Summarize this YouTube video for me
Write a Python script to parse CSV files
Translate this document from Spanish to English
Create a PowerPoint deck for our quarterly review
Help me write unit tests for my authentication module
